/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/data_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/data_recorder_interfaces/srv/detail/start_recording__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/bryce/ros2_workspace/data_collection_ws/build/data_recorder_interfaces: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libdata_recorder_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
